  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2-b3-b4 (b4 on top, b2 on bottom)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b5-b6-b7-b8 (b8 on top, b5 on bottom)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)

    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )

      (on-table b1)

      (on-table b4)

  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b3, b4, b5 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b6, b7, b8, b9, b10, b11 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, ..., b11 on b10)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b12 on table, b13 on b12, ..., b18 on b17)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still on table, but this is the only block)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (still on table, but this is the only block)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5, b4, b3 (b5 on table, b4 on b5, b3 on b4)
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b11, b10, b9, b8, b7, b6 (b11 on table, b10 on b11, ..., b6 on b7)
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b18, b17, b16, b15, b14, b13, b12 (b18 on table, b17 on b18, ..., b12 on b13)
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 1): b4 on table
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 2): b5 on table, b6 on b5
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 2): b7 on table, b8 on b7
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 2): b9 on table, b10 on b9
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 8 (height 4): b11 on table, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (clear b14)
    
    ;; Tower 9 (height 4): b15 on table, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17
    (on-table b15)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (height 1, no change)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 still on table (height 1, no change)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects 
    b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10
    b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20
  )
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 9): b3 on table, b4-b11 stacked on top
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 9): b12 on table, b13-b20 stacked on top
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b11 on table, b10-b3 stacked in reverse order
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b20 on table, b19-b12 stacked in reverse order
      (on-table b20)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects 
    b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10
    b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20
  )
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 9): b3 on table, b4-b11 stacked on top
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 9): b12 on table, b13-b20 stacked on top
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b11 on table, b10-b3 stacked in reverse order
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b20 on table, b19-b12 stacked in reverse order
      (on-table b20)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)
